sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98253" key="sumbateu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμβᾰτ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n98253.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">couple, mate with</tr_> a female, Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coire</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2450.tlg001:39(40)" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Palaeph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39(40)</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
